data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Apple uses a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and robust performance across its platforms.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The site infrastructure is supported by a combination of in-house servers and cloud services.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes a global CDN to provide faster load times and reliability no matter where users access from.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Employs responsive design techniques to ensure compatibility with various devices and screen sizes.

data.title: Monolithic Legacy Systems
data.description: Some parts of the system still rely on monolithic structures for core operations.
